the prisoner s club we warn against the continuation of the occupation s enforced disappearance of gaza detainees in light of the knesset s approval of the extension of the regulations that deny gaza detainees access to lawyers for an additional four months the aim of the occupation is to carry out more crimes against gaza detainees without any real control and to use these regulations as a cover for the ongoing crimes against them the crime of forced disappearance is one of the most serious crimes against detainees today which comes within the framework of the mass aggression and genocide in gaza every day passes with detainees in gaza denied access to lawyers and the occupation insisting on hiding details of their fate where they are being held and their health the horrific and horrifying testimonies of released gaza detainees will escalate including testimonies of torture mutilation starvation humiliation and detention in conditions of human dignity which took place on young men women children and the elderly until today despite the appeals made to many international and competent institutions by the competent authorities on the prisoners in order to obtain any clear information about the gaza detainees these appeals have not led to any results which can reassure their families while confirming that we are talking about several categories of gaza detainees which include resistance fighters workers and civilians including women and children earlier we pointed to data carried by detainees released from ofer prison who were held in detention facilities close to gaza detention facilities which reflects the high level of torture that gaza detainees are subjected to several testimonies given by the detainees to the media in gaza apart from the recognition by the occupation of the execution of one detainee and the revelation by the occupation media of the martyrdom of a group of detainees in the sedih teman camp in beersheba in addition to the martyrdom of two gaza workers one of whom was identified the latest data revealed by the israeli prison administration is that there are 661 detainees from gaza in the prisons under the classification of what the occupation calls illegal combatants along with what the institutions were able to obtain as the number of prisoners arrested from gaza and detained in the prison damon which amounted to more than 50 prisoners until the last data noting that eight prisoners from gaza were recently released we renew the call on international human rights organizations at all levels to review the essence of their role in the period of the aggression against the prisoners and detainees to intervene urgently and immediately to make visits to them and to seek to put pressure on the occupation to reveal the fate of the gaza detainees and to put an end to the crime of forced disappearance

press release issued by the popular front for the liberation of palestine the popular front holds the occupation responsible for starving our people and warns war merchants mercenaries and exploiters against their involvement in increasing suffering and acquiescing to the occupation s plans in light of the unprecedented deterioration of the humanitarian situation and the aggravation of the daily suffering of our people in the gaza strip due to the war of extermination waged by the zionist occupation in addition to the policies of starvation and systematic siege the popular front for the liberation of palestine holds the zionist occupation fully responsible for this catastrophic situation and denounces the international partnership in this crime and the shameful international silence and complicity in the policies of mass starvation and daily war crimes committed against our people and even the involvement of several international institutions in covering up and concealing the crimes of the occupation the front also stresses that war merchants and mercenaries have played and continue to play a major role in exacerbating the repercussions of the occupation s policies on our people and increasing their tragedy and suffering the front affirms that the role of these formations that practice monopoly and sabotage policies and use gang methods of bullying looting and monopolizing goods constitutes a complement to the terrorist policies of the occupation as the front continues to demand and work for a unified national leadership for the battle in all its aspects including the presence of a national administration and policies to support the steadfastness of our people alleviate their suffering and confront the occupation s policy and the treacherous role of war merchants today like all the national forces and free people of our people it is obligated to escalate its role and struggle to protect our people in light of this catastrophic situation the popular front announces its decision along with the forces and free people in gaza to lift the organizational cover from anyone involved in these destructive practices that only serve the occupation and contribute to starving our steadfast people the front stresses that it will confront with all its strength anyone who dares to violate the dignity of citizens or contribute to deepening their crises and suffering the front also renews its full support for the peaceful popular movements that stem from the will of the street and express the just demands to provide the simplest elements of dignity and a decent life in the face of the policies of the occupation and its agents from the merchants of death thieves and those who benefit from raising prices stressing that protecting these movements is a joint national responsibility that falls on the shoulders of all forces keen on the safety of our people the front calls again for activating the popular protection committees to stand firmly against the encroachment of these gangs that attack the dignity of our people and seek to starve and oppress them and to tighten popular control over the markets and combat the policy of raising prices and monopolizing goods and to thwart any attempts to create chaos and undermine the unity of the national ranks at the end of its statement the popular front stresses that it along with all national forces will not hesitate to defend the dignity of our people and will not allow any practices that increase their suffering to pass and will continue to struggle and confront with all firmness anyone who tries to exploit the crisis to achieve personal gains at the expense of the dignity of our people and their steadfastness in the face of the occupation the popular front for the liberation of palestine central media department november 8 2024 haqqintel

a message from the mujahideen of the islamic resistance to his eminence the secretary general our most sacred and supreme martyr sayyed hassan nasrallah may his noble secret be sanctified in the name of god the most gracious the most merciful his eminence the secretary general our most sacred and supreme martyr sayyed hassan nasrallah may your noble secret be sanctified peace be upon you our master peace be upon you our beloved peace be upon your head as a mujahid leader and peace be upon your soul as a loyal martyr peace be upon you from the positions of our cannons and from the salvos of our missiles and from our husseini fists that were are and will remain holding the trigger with which god almighty throws the corruptors on his land and the killers of his prophets and servants o our master o beloved of our hearts we thank god almighty who has bestowed upon us the blessing of jihad in his cause before you and has honored us with knowing you and living in your time and has honored us with following in your footsteps on the path of your grandfather the martyr imam hussein peace be upon him to fight the enemies of god and humanity in defense of the oppressed and the weak and to liberate the land and protect our dear people o our master and beloved of our hearts our souls will bear witness before god almighty that you have fulfilled the trust and fulfilled the covenant that you made and that we made with you and you were patient seeking reward and you led us from victory to victory until your noble soul departed to join a long caravan of your beloved martyrs mujahideen and leaders for as long as our master we have been repeating with our throats and hearts in the fields of jihad that we are at your service o nasrallah and for as long as we have repeated after you the call of rejection of humiliation behold the impostor the son of the impostor has placed himself between two choices between the basket and humiliation and humiliation is far from us and for as long as we have repeated with you the position of the supporters of your grandfather al hussein peace be upon him when he said to them this night has enveloped you so take it as a camel so that we may say to you today and why do we do that shall we not remain after you for by god if we had known that we would be killed then burned then scattered in the air and that this would be done to us a thousand times we would not have abandoned your path nor would we have forsaken our covenant with you o his eminence the secretary general o greatest jihadist leader o master of the caravan of mujahideen martyrs and martyrs of the march of hezbollah jihad and resistance o supporter of the oppressed and the free people of the world may god not make life pleasant for us after you we swear by your noble soul from the borders of palestine on whose path you passed as a martyr and from the sites of the islamic resistance throughout the homeland that we by god will continue on our covenant and continue on our promise until we achieve your hopes and goals no matter how great the sacrifices as for the arrogant and delusional enemy we say the days nights and the field are between us you will meet us as skilled shooters from where you expect and from where you do not expect and to our patient proud and loyal people we say by the groans of the tortured and the torn limbs the killer will not be spared from our might and revenge and he will not be affected by our determination and the banner will not fall from our hand and this is our covenant our promise and our oath and since you always promised us victory we promise you victory again your loyal sons the mujahideen of the islamic resistance

283: the palestinian commission of prisoners and ex prisoners affairs and the palestinian prisoners club have confirmed the martyrdom of 22 year old administrative detainee louay faisal nasrallah from jenin louay was transferred from negev prison to soroka hospital where he was pronounced martyred on the morning of june 30 2025 no further details have been provided about the circumstances of his martyrdom nasrallah had been held without charge since march 26 2024 he now joins the growing list of martyrs in what the two organizations describe as a systematic campaign of torture medical neglect and starvation inside israeli prisons according to his family nasrallah had no prior health conditions before his arrest he had been held in negev prison one of the most notorious israeli detention centers where an outbreak of scabies has turned into what rights groups call a deliberate method of slow execution with his martyrdom the number of documented palestinian prisoners martyred since the start of the genocide has risen to 73 including at least 45 from gaza and one child these are only those whose identities have been confirmed while dozens more prisoners from gaza remain subject to enforced disappearance the total number of known prisoner martyrs since 1967 has now reached 310 according to the palestinian prisoners club among them are 81 martyrs whose bodies remain withheld by the israeli occupation including 70 since the beginning of the genocide the occupation continues to deny families the right to bury their loved ones and obstructs all pathways to accountability the prisoners club and the commission warned that thousands of palestinians currently imprisoned are at imminent risk subjected to continuous abuse including torture starvation medical crimes sexual violence and conditions that spread serious infectious diseases they hold the israeli occupation fully responsible for the martyrdom of louay nasrallah and renew their call on the international human rights system to take urgent and effective steps to hold israel accountable end its impunity and impose sanctions that would isolate it globally and restore the role of international law glory to the martyrs freethemall

303: following the attack by western backed syrian opposition forces on aleppo southeast of idlib and north of hama here are the latest developments from today syrian army units are engaged in fierce clashes north of hama on several axes coinciding with syrian russian airstrikes syrian and russian air forces have conducted several airstrikes killing over 100 opposition fighters the general army command stated that in the last 24 hours 400 terrorists were eliminated and 12 sites and ammo depots were destroyed in precise strikes in aleppo hama and idlib outskirts in recent hours dozens of terrorists have been killed by syrian russian airstrikes in hama and idlib outskirts a number of prominent hts leaders have been killed the syrian army has regained control of several towns that were taken temporarily all towns and villages on the mahardeh suqaylabiyah highway have been liberated including karnaz tal malah al jalamah jabbin hayalin and sheikh hadid in hama syrian air defenses shot down an opposition drone nullifying the threat that the opposition thought would be more successful local sources added that 15 000 volunteers joined the syrian army in hama in recent hours clashes are also continuing east of hama and fighters have arrive in the northern and northeastern axes of the city at this time syrian army forces are advancing towards al safira supported by their allies iraqi fighters have arrived on several axes to support the efforts of the syrian army as well as fighters from other aspects of the axis of resistance reaching north and east of hama and south of aleppo reinforcements will continue to arrive along with irgc military advisors to ensure the stability of the country the us backed syrian democratic forces have mobilized against the syrian army on the deir ezzor front in the east and thus the army has raised its readiness accordingly russian sources also reported that hts is preparing to release toxic substances in aleppo and idlib and these materials were transported to the turkestan islamic party base to aleppo and idlib using ambulances operated by the white helmets sources added that the opposition fighters are receiving intelligence information from turkish and ukrainian officers their drones use advanced technology provided by the us in addition to communications jammers they were trained on these by ukrainian advisors and the turkestan islamic party while the syrian counterattack has not yet begun the syrian army and its allies have made significant gains to subdue to advance of the western and zionist backed opposition forces following their strategic retreat

field update by the syrian popular resistance the deadly ambushes continue to take a toll on the ranks of the terrorist gangs of hay at tahrir al sham hts in the syrian coast as the enemy suffers heavy losses in both personnel and equipment amid a collapse in its ranks the resistance factions have established control over the areas of drekish shu bat al harb and jannina raslan expanding their operations into masyaf in hama province the resistance successfully carried out capturing operations with 37 members of the terrorist julani gangs falling into the hands of the mujahideen in the countryside of tartous the resistance has gained control over the artillery weaponry at nabi yunis peak the highest strategic point in the coastal region in a precision strike targeting the enemy resistance units successfully neutralized a vehicle loaded with hay at tahrir al sham militants which was attempting to target civilian homes and government headquarters in tartous this operation adds to a series of accurate strikes that have broken the enemy s back a military convoy belonging to hts gangs fell into a resistance trap at the entrance to latakia where their vehicles were targeted inflicting severe losses in their ranks fierce battles took place around talkalakh in the countryside of homs where the resistance factions engaged in intense combat against hts gangs inflicting heavy casualties on them the capturing operations are ongoing with enemy fighters continuously falling into the hands of the resistance the al muntar checkpoint has completely fallen under the control of the resistance in a devastating blow to the enemy the syrian popular resistance executed a well planned ambush in tartous against an hts force leaving many dead and wounded adding new losses to their record of collapses across the battlefronts the resistance factions engaged in brutal battles in the town of salma in latakia province inflicting heavy losses on the enemy in both personnel and equipment a resistance ambush on the tartous highway resulted in dozens of enemy casualties both killed and wounded the resistance s heavy fire continues to pound the convoys of hts gangs in latakia while the enemy fails to achieve any field breakthroughs despite its large reinforcements violent clashes erupted in baniyas as the resistance continues to inflict further losses on the enemy across all fronts the syrian popular resistance units targeted hts convoys on the m4 highway employing precise ambush tactics and surprise strikes leading to many enemy casualties and the destruction of several military vehicles the enemy is staggering under the relentless blows of the resistance factions while its intelligence and allies fail to secure supply lines battles rage across multiple fronts and the resistance persists in crushing the terrorist julani gangs with enemy casualties rising and their defensive lines collapsing haqqintel

israeli prime minister benjamin netanyahu has declared that the newly established syrian army will not be permitted to move into the area south of damascus he emphasized that the israeli army will maintain its presence on mount hermon and in the buffer zone within the occupied golan heights this statement follows israel s military incursion into the buffer zone in the occupied golan heights after the fall of bashar al assad s regime a move that directly violates the 1974 ceasefire agreement between israel and syria

528: the international association of genocide scholars has passed a resolution stating that israel s actions in gaza meet the legal definition of genocide under the 1948 un genocide convention according to its president the resolution was supported by 86 of voting members within the 500 strong organization

a united nations inquiry commission has concluded that israel is committing genocide in the gaza strip meeting four out of five criteria outlined in the 1948 genocide convention these include killing members of the group causing serious bodily and mental harm imposing conditions calculated to physically destroy the group and forcibly transferring children to another group the report points to the responsibility of senior israeli leaders including prime minister benjamin netanyahu president isaac herzog and former defense minister yoav gallant for inciting acts of genocide the commission called on the international community to halt arms supplies to israel and to take steps to prevent complicity in these actions

palestinian prisoners center details of the first phase of the prisoner exchange deal the first phase of the prisoner exchange deal agreed upon between the resistance in gaza and the occupation includes the release of more than half of the prisoners sentenced to life imprisonment specifics of the first phase the first phase will include the release of 600 prisoners all of whom have sentences exceeding 15 years among them approximately 290 prisoners are serving life sentences representing about half of the 566 prisoners sentenced to life in occupation prisons veteran prisoners the release will include 21 veteran prisoners detained before the oslo accords who have spent decades in occupation prisons or serving life sentences the shortest serving among them has completed 30 consecutive years of imprisonment these prisoners will have priority for release in the deal freed prisoners re arrested the first phase will also include 47 prisoners released in the 2011 wafaa al ahrar deal but re arrested by the occupation among them are veteran prisoners who had served decades behind bars before their previous release many were sentenced again to life imprisonment women children and vulnerable groups the first phase will secure the release of all 85 female prisoners from across all regions it will include all minors numbering over 340 children a number of elderly prisoners and those suffering from severe illnesses will also be released prisoners from gaza the west bank al quds and palestinian lands occupied in 1948 the phase will include prisoners with high sentences from all regions including gaza the west bank al quds and inside 1948 occupied lands additionally 1 000 prisoners from gaza arrested during the genocide war on the strip will be released out of a total of more than 3 000 prisoners still detained from gaza the importance of the deal the deal is significant not only for the large numbers of prisoners to be released but also for the caliber of prisoners included priority will be given to approximately 1 500 prisoners including veteran prisoners and those with high sentences who have spent many years behind bars 539 deans of prisoners who have served over 20 consecutive years in prison 43 prisoners who have been detained for more than 25 years 21 prisoners held for over 30 years including the oldest prisoner mohammed al tous from al khalil who has been imprisoned since october 1985 a historic exchange the deal if completed as planned will be the most significant prisoner exchange in history executed by the palestinian resistance despite the occupation s opposition it will include prisoners who were previously impossible to release in earlier deals nor through the goodwill agreements facilitated by the palestinian authority in 2013

616: last clog maker in the old city of nablus haj walid khudair 71 known as abu khaled works in his carpentry shop in qaysariyya neighborhood he spent over 55 years crafting wooden clogs since he was 15 as his family owned a workshop in lydd in 1948 for abu khaled this craft is a significant part of palestinian heritage dating back to the fatimid and ottoman eras clogs were essential in homes and public bathhouses abu khaled says this craft is about to go extinct i am the only one practicing it still it s a craft without a future as the israelis restrictions on cutting pine trees have made it extremely difficult abu khaled is the last carpenter making wooden clogs in palestine while this craft is disappearing some mosques and traditional baths in nablus still preserve this tradition known as little damascus

kataeb hezbollah press release on april 7 reuters published a report containing statements attributed to what it called a kataeb hezbollah commander these statements have no connection to our principles or positions in this regard we affirm that there are no statements by the kataeb hezbollah in the media these statements are limited to the official spokesman sayyed mohammed mohi and the military spokesman sayyed jaafar al husseini anything other than these statements is considered a lie and slander while we call on local and international media outlets to be accurate and credible in their publications and to obtain information from authentic sources we reserve the right to legally pursue media outlets and their staff who practice misinformation and publish news not supported by official sources this is to preserve the standards of truthfulness objectivity and established journalistic publishing rules as well as to protect the public and public opinion from campaigns of lies and fabrication kataeb hezbollah media office april 7 2025

statement issued by hezbollah s media relations department in the name of allah the most gracious the most merciful hezbollah s media relations department reiterates and affirms that the party does not rely on what is referred to as a source in hezbollah official source or any similar term to convey its political positions therefore anything published under such labels is entirely false and baseless and cannot be relied upon consequently we are in no way concerned with anything said outside the framework of our clear and publicly declared positions it further confirms that what some media outlets report under the titles of sources close to hezbollah or sources familiar with hezbollah s position in no way reflects the views or stance of hezbollah rather they are merely personal interpretations and analyses or possibly fabricated sources with politically motivated agendas in this context the media relations department urges all media outlets journalists and analysts to exercise the highest levels of accuracy professionalism and objectivity and to engage exclusively with statements and information issued by official and authorized hezbollah bodies it calls on them to refrain from attributing any information to the party under the label of sources and to treat such information as unauthenticated and not representative of hezbollah we urge all media outlets especially during these sensitive and critical times to consult the authorized party within hezbollah for accurate positions and perspectives regarding current events and developments hezbollah media relations thursday june 26 2025 thou al hijjah 30 1446 haqqintel
